## How it was tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run type-check`, and `npm test` pass
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for non-trivial logic
- [ ] Updated relevant architecture notes (`src/lib/*.md`) if the design changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or API keys in the diff
